name: Shinsung Tongsang Co., Ltd.
summary: Shinsung Tongsang Co., Ltd. manufactures, distributes, and sells fashion products in Korea. The company also exports fibers and clothes of various brands, including UNIONBAY, OLZEN, ZIOZIA, TOPTEN10, AND Z, and Edition through its sales network, such as branch retail stores, department stores, and discount stores. In addition, it operates RICHMART, a local community-based discount store. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
